title: festuca ovina var. gracilior
intro: Festuca ovina var. gracilior, also known as sheep's fescue, is a variety of grass that belongs to the genus Festuca. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. gracilior include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate colds, sore throats, and other respiratory issues.
